Describe the visual progression of the landscape and wildlife observed throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, red-tinted grass dominates the foreground with white fluffy vegetation; at 10s, reddish-brown ground cover appears with scattered white patches across the field; at 14s, a large flock of white birds becomes visible in the lower frame against a dark treeline.

question: What changes occur in the foreground vegetation and sky conditions over time?
canonical_answer: At 0s, dense red-colored vegetation fills the foreground under a bright sky; at 10s, low-lying reddish-brown vegetation covers the ground with a dark hillside visible; at 14s, white birds appear in the field while clouds show a pinkish hue indicating dawn or dusk lighting conditions.
